params.name: Homunculus
params.description: The Book of Natural Philosophy once recorded that alchemists would mix human blood, horse manure, and various herbs in a flask, stirring them evenly before sealing it. After fermenting for forty days, a new species in the shape of a human would appear inside the flask. This being would then need to be nurtured with a secret elixir made from human blood, eventually resulting in a Homunculus that is indistinguishable from a human.
